title: Dogfood autonomous frontier on a real mission
goal: Implement AF-08 from docs/roadmap/auto-frontier/09-dogfood.md. Run the staged real-Pi dogfood proof for the autonomous frontier: Stage A shadow classification and manual accept agreement, Stage B run-level auto-promotion/execution/publication, Stage C narrowed-envelope Tier-3 stop with RW-2 notification and operator decision, plus a duplicate-closed rerun guard. Write daemon-state evidence under docs/design/evidence/frontier-dogfood-2026-07-09.md.
acceptance: Stage A proves shadow mode with a real Pi worker: candidate emitted, Tier-1 classification recorded, queue unchanged, operator manually accepts, and agreement evidence appears in the report.

Stage B proves run-level autonomy: auto-accept authorizer envelope:<run>, generated slice committed before execution, generated slice runs/closes, publication truth and handoff promotion graph are correct.
Stage C proves Tier-3 stop: narrowed envelope pauses in awaiting_replan, origin notification is observed, operator decision records and run resumes/completes.
The duplicate-closed rerun guard is observed live: a rediscovered already-closed follow-up classifies duplicate_closed and is not promoted or rerun.
Evidence doc cites daemon state/artifacts/commits only and explicitly avoids terminal text or prose-only claims.
must_ask_if: If any staged dogfood run requires operator intent, ask with the exact daemon commands and do not fabricate evidence.
If the frontier implementation fails a stage, stop and return blocked JSON with the failing run id, evidence path, and proposed follow-up slice instead of papering over it.
